description: Comment posted on the Birchal communication facility by an external food journalist with no FarmThru relationship — no relationship disclosure needed because they are independent. Should pass ADV-005.
text:
Comment posted on the Birchal communication facility:

"I've been writing about Sydney food retail for the better part of a decade. I have no commercial relationship with FarmThru and I am not a shareholder. From the outside looking in, what makes this raise interesting is the unit economics on the Brookvale hub — most regen-grocery experiments I've tracked over the years have failed to clear the operating-margin hurdle from a single store. Whether FarmThru can extend the Brookvale numbers across more hubs is a separate question, but the founding model is more disciplined than most."

— Posted by @j_thompson_food, 25 April 2026.
